title: Playground Operations Console
concept: A persistent command-center interface that replaces modal-first navigation with a left workflow rail, a dense operational workbench, and a live WordPress preview kept in context.
flows: Start a new Playground from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or .zip import
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with visible copy progress
Browse, rename, delete, and reopen saved Playgrounds from the Library view
Open Site Manager settings, switch Homepage or WP Admin, reset/reload runtime settings, export to GitHub, or download a .zip
Use the file browser to create, upload, browse, and edit WordPress files
Browse/filter the Blueprint gallery, edit blueprint.json, copy links, download bundles, and run blueprints
Inspect database details, download database.sqlite, open Adminer or phpMyAdmin, and review Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
file browser with create folder/file upload browse and code editing
view copy download and run current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver path and size
